internal_services.service_name: Collection of Legal Claims of Job Order and Casual Employees
internal_services.image: /assets/document_background/Collection of Legal Claims of Job Order and Casual Employees
internal_services.who_may_avail: Job Order and Casual employees of the City Government of Lipa

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements to the Lipa City Treasurer's Office – Cash and Disbursement Division
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the approved voucher and check for completeness
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Administrative Aide IV (Cash & Disbursement Division, Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements to the Lipa City Treasurer's Office – Cash and Disbursement Division
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Administrative Aide IV (Cash & Disbursement Division, Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements to the Lipa City Treasurer's Office – Cash and Disbursement Division
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Review and forward the check to the Administrative Division for Electronic Statement of Receipts and Expenditures (ESRE) encoding
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Administrative Aide IV (Cash & Disbursement Division, Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements to the Lipa City Treasurer's Office – Cash and Disbursement Division

steps.agency_action: 2. Release check or cash to the claimant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Assistant V (Cash & Disbursement Division, Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

total_summary.total_processing_time: Cash payment - 30 minutes / Check payment – 45 minutes
